creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Hi Nicola,

here is the patch based on Kubilay's one, that adds py3 packing list 
shims. Now it builds fine both with py2/py3. Would you approve the 
change? It will allow us to build py-numpy with python3. Thanks.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
